context.si_title: Solution Intent - Digital Payment Notification Service

outcome_evidence.quote: The outcome for review round two is changes requested.
outcome_evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

findings.title: Missing traffic-failover behaviour
findings.description: The design shows two replicas but does not define traffic behaviour when one application instance is unavailable.
findings.recommended_change: Describe the failure path and update the deployment diagram to show how traffic is handled when a replica is unavailable.

evidence.quote: behaviour when one replica becomes unavailable is not described.
The deployment design shows two replicas, but it does not explain how traffic fails over when one instance becomes unavailable.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

evidence.quote: I will update the Availability and Resilience section and the deployment diagram by 24 July 2026.
evidence.speaker: Alex Chen

findings.title: Missing RTO and RPO
findings.description: The Solution Intent does not define recovery time or recovery point objectives.
findings.recommended_change: Record the product-approved RTO and RPO values in the Solution Intent.

evidence.quote: recovery point objective (RPO) values are not yet defined.
The RTO and RPO have not been stated, so that remains an open finding.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

evidence.quote: I will confirm the RTO and RPO values by 25 July 2026.
evidence.speaker: Priya Shah

findings.title: Undefined production support ownership
findings.description: The production support team and escalation path have not been assigned.
findings.recommended_change: Name the production support owner and document the escalation path before release approval.

evidence.quote: Production support ownership has not yet been assigned.
Production support ownership is not defined in the current Solution Intent.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

decisions.statement: Managed PostgreSQL is accepted as the system of record.
decisions.rationale: It supports the proposed notification-status and idempotency data design.

evidence.quote: I confirm that managed PostgreSQL is accepted as the system of record for this service.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

risks.description: Pending production database sizing may affect the planned August release.

evidence.quote: Production database sizing is still pending, and that may affect the planned August release.
evidence.speaker: Alex Chen

action_items.title: Update the resilience design and deployment diagram

evidence.quote: I will update the Availability and Resilience section and the deployment diagram by 24 July 2026.
evidence.speaker: Alex Chen

action_items.title: Confirm the RTO and RPO values

evidence.quote: I will confirm the RTO and RPO values by 25 July 2026.
evidence.speaker: Priya Shah

open_questions.question: Should Redis be used as a cache?

evidence.quote: Redis may be introduced as a cache
Redis has been discussed as a possible cache, but no decision has been made.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

missing_evidence.reason: The recovery objectives are required to assess the proposed resilience design.

evidence.quote: recovery point objective (RPO) values are not yet defined.
The RTO and RPO have not been stated, so that remains an open finding.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee

missing_evidence.reason: An owning team and escalation path are required before release approval.

evidence.quote: Production support ownership has not yet been assigned.
Production support ownership is not defined in the current Solution Intent.
evidence.speaker: Jordan Lee
